title: ozoroa insignis subsp. latifolia
intro: Ozoroa insignis subsp. latifolia is a subspecies of the Ozoroa insignis plant, a member of the Anacardiaceae family, commonly known as the mango and poison ivy family. The Ozoroa insignis subsp. latifolia plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Ozoroa insignis subsp. latifolia is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine as a remedy for various ailments.
